4	Stefan Georgi
BONUS 1	VIdeo 1.2 - Research Keto 2
more emotional lead of “Basically, they know me by my first name at Goodwill
because I am coming in every week. I’m not just philanthropic” - everyone
uses that word for market.
(02:06)
Or probably just, “A charitable person, although of course, I am believe it or
not, but it’s because I just keep dropping off more and more of my clothes.
In fact, my closet is almost empty and it’s not that I’m giving away everything
or that I only have a few months to live, but because I just keep losing so
much weight that literally none of my clothing fits anymore. It’s all way too
big and too baggy. I started shopping and I’m having so much fun picking out
sexy dresses, flattering shirts, blouses and even shoes. It’s more fun trying on
shoes because my feet aren’t fat.
(02:48)
My husband is annoyed, he says I’m shopping too much, but what am I going
to do - walk around naked? I can’t and it’s all thanks to the keto diet, but not
just any keto diet. In fact, I tried the keto diet for over a year and continued
to fail. I would lose weight and then stall or limit my carbs, but not go into
ketosis or have no energy and be tired even though I lost some weight and it
was just all up and down. In fact, I really thought the keto diet just wasn’t for
me able to work, but that’s before I discovered this simple keto breakthrough
that I want to share with you inside this presentation.
(03:31)
It’s a way that I was able to finally get into ketosis with startling speed. In fact,
it took me just a couple of days and I started losing weight, but it’s also helped
me to stay in ketosis for months since I’ve started to where here I am today
having to give away my entire wardrobe. Yes, it actually is expensive having to
buy new clothes, but God, it’s also a lot of fun and if it means I’m going to live
another 10, 20, 30 years, then it’s worth it and it’s worth it to see the way that
my husband looks at me, how he can’t take his eyes off me, how other people
react to me, how fun it is going on vacation and feeling comfortable putting
on my swimsuit, seeing the love handles go. We talk about love handles on
the side of our stomach, in our belly and I’ve had those, but I feel like my love
handles were everywhere, not just the sides of my stomach, but in my back, I
had fat on my back, these folds of fat and fat in my ankles and legs. Instead
of a love handle, it was more like a love canvas because my entire body was
just covered in these lumps of fat.

5	Stefan Georgi

(04:46)
But that’s all gone now. In fact, I’m skinnier than I’ve ever been. My cholesterol
is down, my blood sugar is down. I have so much energy. I’m sleeping better.
Honestly, I feel less hormonal than I’d been in a long time and again, this all
thanks to this keto diet breakthrough that I found and that I want to share
with you inside this video. So if you felt frustrated by the keto diet in the past,
whether you’ve never tried it and you want to, but you’re scared, or don’t know
where to start, or you feel like you’ve tried in the past and failed, or if you
are afraid of macros and counting calories and carbs, don’t know how much
protein you should have, any of these things, then I want you to really stick
with me because what I’m about to show you is just hands-down the easiest,
fastest way to start burning fat and losing weight in ketosis.
(05:36)
In fact, it doesn’t require to count any macros. In fact, you don’t have to take
any supplements. I’ll tell you more about why most keto supplements are
garbage in a minute. Instead, it just requires you to do these three simple
steps that make getting into ketosis, staying in ketosis, and then thriving in
ketosis incredibly simple and I’m going to share them with you right now. So
who am I? Well, I’m so and so and here’s my emotional story.”
(06:04)
I don’t have the emotional story yet, but we’ll get there. I don’t know, man. This
is the power of research, in my opinion. I’m looking at this keto diet and stuff
and then getting ideas, looking at pain points and problems. I’m going to keep
doing that and some emotional stuff. I’m going to look at horror stories in a
minute, I’ll film a video on that.
(06:28)
First, I’m going to go through and look at more positive language and other
victories that are in here. That’s my next step but that’s just the power of this

I’ll come back and I’ll share, rather than film myself doing all of this research, as
